videos.headline: McNamara airs it out 87 yards to Cornelius Johnson for a Michigan TD
videos.description: Michigan goes up 35-3 after Cade McNamara drops a dime to Cornelius Johnson for the 87-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (McNamara airs it out 87 yards to Cornelius Johnson for a Michigan TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Corum's run inside the 5 sets up McNamara's TD
videos.description: Michigan gets on the board after running back Blake Corum gets the ball to the four, leading to a short Cade McNamara touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Corum's run inside the 5 sets up McNamara's TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Corum follows blockers into end zone for short TD
videos.description: Blake Corum extends the Wolverines' lead after the short one-yard touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Corum follows blockers into end zone for short TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haskins goes airborne for the TD
videos.description: Hassan Haskins goes over the top of the pile for the one-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One Play (Haskins goes airborne for the TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haskins fights through 2 defenders for another Michigan TD
videos.description: Hassan Haskins gets the handoff and goes through two defenders for the five-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haskins fights through 2 defenders for another Michigan TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Corum tightropes sidelines for 51-yard TD
videos.description: Blake Corum hits the corner and takes off down the sidelines for a 51-yard touchdown for Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Corum tightropes sidelines for 51-yard TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Green's INT sets up Michigan's 8th TD of the game
videos.description: Gemon Green picks off the pass and returns it to the 3-yard line, setting up a Donovan Edwards 4-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Green's INT sets up Michigan's 8th TD of the game) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: See ya! Donovan Edwards takes off for 58-yard TD
videos.description: Michigan's Donovan Edwards flies by the defense for the 58-yard touchdown run.
